personality_one_liner: A premium, engaging gig marketplace that feels as snappy and rewarding as a modern social app.

typography.note: Font weight capped at 500 across the app per system rules. Use size for hierarchy instead of heavier weights.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Cards never flush to screen edges. Minimum 56pt tappable heights.

do_s: Bottom tab bar background (when content scrolls behind)
Featured swipe cards (frosted overlay on imagery)

platform_libraries.swipe_cards: react-native-reanimated and react-native-gesture-handler for fluid Tinder-like swipe physics

components.PrimaryButton: Large 56pt height, 'pill' radius, brandPrimary background, centered text. Add overshoot spring on press.
components.SecondaryButton: 56pt height, 'pill' radius, surface background, border 1.5pt borderStrong. Used for secondary actions.
components.JobSwipeCard: Full-bleed image card. 85% viewport width, 70% viewport height. Radius 32px. Dark overlay gradient (top to bottom) over image. White text at bottom (Title, Salary, Distance). Floating chip for 'Urgent' at top right.
components.MatchPercentageBadge: Pill shaped, surface background, accentPurple text + spark icon, positioned dynamically on cards.
components.FloatingActionButtons: Large circular buttons below the swipe card. Red cross for Pass (surface background, red icon), Green heart for Like (brandPrimary background, white icon). Size 64x64.
components.BottomTabBar: Glass effect. Floating center primary action (+ Create Shift for Business, or Shifts list for Student) wrapped in a red circle.
components.Chip: Pill radius, surfaceTertiary background. Active state: brandPrimary background with white text.

screens.name: Splash

states.loading: Animated 'S' logo with handshake + clock + speed lines.

screens.layout: Full bleed surface layout. Logo centered. 'ShiftPe' wordmark below.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Introduce platform to Students and Businesses

states.empty: Carousel with custom illustrations, brief title, subtitle.

screens.layout: Full-bleed illustration per step, text below, persistent Primary CTA sticky at bottom.

screens.name: RoleSelect
screens.layout: Two massive touchable cards vertically stacked. Student (Looking for shifts) / Business (Hiring). Active state gets brandPrimary border.

screens.name: Student Home (Swipe)
screens.purpose: Tinder-style card stack for gig discovery

states.empty: Illustration: 'No more shifts in your area' + 'Refresh' CTA.

screens.layout: Centered Stack. JobSwipeCard at center. Action row (Pass / Like) below the card. Glass BottomTabBar at the very bottom.

screens.name: Job Details
screens.purpose: Deep dive into the gig requirements
screens.layout: Hero image at top with glass back button. Scrollable details area. Sticky Apply CTA pinned to the bottom above safe area.

screens.name: Business Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of active gigs and applicants
screens.layout: Metrics grid at top (Active Shifts, New Applicants) with brandTertiary backgrounds. Scrollable list of recent applications below.

cafe_job_cover.alt: Modern cafe interior with espresso machine

delivery_job_cover.alt: Electric scooter food delivery in city

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Cap all font weights to 500 max. Do NOT use 600, 700, or 'bold' in styling for Poppins; use larger font sizes to establish visual hierarchy instead.
Implement the swipe cards using react-native-gesture-handler and react-native-reanimated to ensure 60fps smooth spring physics.
Always apply a top-to-bottom dark gradient overlay (scrim) on the job cover images so the white text at the bottom is highly readable.
Use the brandPrimary (#FF3D57) strategically for primary actions and the 'Like' interactions, avoiding overuse to maintain the 'white space' premium feel.
Do NOT use pure navy or purple for primary buttons; stick to the coral red.
Use expo-blur for the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to deliver the 'Glass blur' premium Android feel requested.
For the bottom tab bar, place a distinct floating action button in the center (e.g., wrapped in a brandPrimary circle) overlapping the tab bar.
